Accepts a visitor to perform an operation on this node.

Action - Class in compiler.simulation
Immutable runtime action produced by a critter interpreter.
Action(ActionType) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Action
Creates an action without an argument.
Action(ActionType, Integer) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Action
Creates an action, optionally with an integer argument.
ActionNode - Class in compiler.ast.command
Represents an action command in the AST.
ActionNode(TokenType, int, int, Expression) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.command.ActionNode
Creates an action node.
ActionType - Enum Class in compiler.simulation
Runtime action types supported by critters.
addCritter(Critter, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Controller
Adds a critter to the world and schedules it for future turns.
addFood(int, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Adds food to a valid non-rock, non-critter hex.
ADDOP - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Category: additive operators (+ or -).
adjustEnergy(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Adds the given delta to energy and updates alive status.
AHEAD - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: ahead (query the cell ahead).
AND - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: and (logical conjunction).
ARROW - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: --> (used in rule syntax).
AsciiTreePrinter - Class in compiler.ast
Pretty-prints the abstract syntax tree as an ASCII tree diagram.
AsciiTreePrinter() - Constructor for class compiler.ast.AsciiTreePrinter
Creates an ASCII tree printer visitor.
ASSIGN - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: := (assignment operator).
ASTNode - Class in compiler.ast
Base class for all abstract syntax tree nodes.
ASTNode(int, int, ASTNode...) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Initializes an AST node at the given source location.
ASTNode(int, int, List<? extends ASTNode>) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Alternative constructor accepting children as a List.
ASTNodeUtils - Class in compiler.ast
Utility methods for common AST node operations.
ASTVisitor<T> - Interface in compiler.ast
Interface for visiting AST nodes and performing operations on them.
ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: attack (attack adjacent enemy).
ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Attack an adjacent target.
ATTACK_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 

B

BACKWARD - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: backward (move opposite to current direction).
BACKWARD - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Move one hex backward.
BASE_DAMAGE - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
BinaryExpr - Class in compiler.ast.expression
Represents a binary arithmetic expression in the AST.
BinaryExpr(Expression, String, Expression, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.expression.BinaryExpr
Creates a binary arithmetic expression node.
BUD - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: bud (reproduce).
BUD - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Attempt to reproduce by budding.
BUD_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 

C

calculateAppearance(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Calculates the critter's appearance encoding as seen by an observer.
Cmd - Interface in compiler.ast.marker
Marker interface for AST command nodes.
column - Variable in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Source column number (1-based) where this node begins in the source code.
Command - Class in compiler.ast.command
Base class for all command AST nodes.
Command(int, int, ASTNode...) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.command.Command
Initializes a Command node at the given source location.
CommandList - Class in compiler.ast.command
Represents a command sequence: zero or more memory updates followed by a terminal action.
CommandList(List<UpdateNode>, Command, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.command.CommandList
Creates a command list with optional memory updates followed by a terminal action.

Condition - Class in compiler.ast.condition
Base class for all condition AST nodes.

Console - Class in compiler.io
Command-line interface for the critter simulation.
Console() - Constructor for class compiler.io.Console
 
Constants - Class in compiler.simulation
Global simulation constants loaded from constants.txt.
controller - Variable in class compiler.io.WorldLoader.WorldAndController
 
Controller - Class in compiler.simulation
Sequential simulation driver.
Controller(World) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Controller
Creates a controller with an empty turn order.
Controller(World, List<Critter>) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Controller
Creates a controller with an explicit initial turn order.
createOffspring(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a newborn critter inheriting behavior from this critter.
critter(Critter) - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Creates a critter-containing hex state.
Critter - Class in compiler.simulation
Mutable critter state tracked by the world and controller.
Critter(int, int, int, int, int, InterpreterVisitor) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a critter with explicit position, size, and interpreter.
Critter(int, int, int, int, Program) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a critter with explicit position and a program-backed interpreter.
Critter(int, int, int, int, InterpreterVisitor) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a critter with explicit position and interpreter.
Critter(int, int, Program) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a critter at the origin with a program-backed interpreter.
Critter(int, int, InterpreterVisitor) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.Critter
Creates a critter at the origin with a provided interpreter.
CritterLoader - Class in compiler.io
Loads critter specifications from text files.
CritterLoader() - Constructor for class compiler.io.CritterLoader
 

D

DEFENSE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Defense stat slot.
distance(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexMath
Computes distance between two doubled-coordinate hex positions.
distance(int, int, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Computes hex distance between two coordinates.
dx() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Returns x delta for one step in this direction.
dy() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Returns y delta for one step in this direction.

EAT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType

EAT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType

ENERGY_PER_SIZE - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
EOF - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType

G

getActionType() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.ActionNode
Returns the action type.
getArgument() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.ActionNode
Returns the optional argument (for SERVE action only).
getArgument() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.SensorNode
Returns the optional argument expression.
getArgument() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Action
Returns the optional argument.
getChildren() - Method in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Returns the immediate children of this node in source order.
getChildren() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.ActionNode

getChildren() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.UpdateNode

getChildren() - Method in class compiler.ast.Program
 
getChildren() - Method in class compiler.ast.Rule
 
getColumn() - Method in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Returns the source column number where this node begins.
getColumn() - Method in exception class compiler.error.SyntaxException
Returns the source column where the error occurred.
getColumn() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Token
Returns the source column number.
getCommand() - Method in class compiler.ast.Rule
Returns the command to execute if this rule's condition is true.
getComplexity() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Computes critter complexity using the formula: complexity = r * RULE_COST + (offense + defense) * ABILITY_COST
getCondition() - Method in class compiler.ast.Rule
Returns the condition that must be true for this rule to fire.
getCritter() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns the critter occupant.
getCritterAt(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Returns the critter at the given coordinate, if any.
getDefense() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns defensive ability.
getDirection() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the current direction index in range 0..5.
getEnergy() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the current energy value.
getFoodAmount() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns food amount.
getHeight() - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Returns world height.
getHex(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Returns state at the given coordinate.
getIndex() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.MemoryNode
Returns the index expression.
getIndex() - Method in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Returns the backing memory index for this sugar name.
getIndexSugar(String) - Static method in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Resolves a sugar name to its memory index, or returns null when unknown.
getInterpreterVisitor() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the behavior interpreter.
getLeft() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.LogicNode
Returns the left-hand side condition.
getLeft() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.RelationNode
Returns the left-hand side expression.
getLeft() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.BinaryExpr
Returns the left operand.
getLexeme() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Token
Returns the original source lexeme text.
getLine() - Method in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Returns the source line number where this node begins.
getLine() - Method in exception class compiler.error.SyntaxException
Returns the source line where the error occurred.
getLine() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Token
Returns the source line number.
getliteral() - Method in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Returns the canonical textual representation of this token type.
getMemory() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the critter's memory array.
getMemorySize() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the memory size (number of memory slots).
getMemoryValue(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
Reads a value from the critter's memory array (for testing/debugging).
getOffense() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns offensive ability.
getOperator() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.LogicNode
Returns the logical operator.
getOperator() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.RelationNode
Returns the relational operator.
getOperator() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.BinaryExpr
Returns the operator.
getPosture() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the posture value.
getProgram() - Method in class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
Returns the backing program (immutable reference).
getRight() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.LogicNode
Returns the right-hand side condition.
getRight() - Method in class compiler.ast.condition.RelationNode
Returns the right-hand side expression.
getRight() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.BinaryExpr
Returns the right operand.
getRuleCount() - Method in class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
Returns the number of rules in the backing program.
getRules() - Method in class compiler.ast.Program
Returns the ordered list of rules in this program.
getSensorType() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.SensorNode
Returns the sensor type.
getSize() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the current critter size.
getTargetMemory() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.UpdateNode
Returns the target memory slot index expression.
getTerminalAction() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.CommandList
Returns the terminal action executed after all updates.
getTurnOrder() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Controller
Returns an immutable view of the current turn order.
getType() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Token
Returns the token type (category).
getType() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Action
Returns the action kind.
getUpdates() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.CommandList
Returns the memory updates in execution order.
getValue() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.UpdateNode
Returns the value expression to be stored.
getValue() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.NumberNode
Returns the numeric value.
getValue() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Token
Returns the numeric payload associated with this token.
getWidth() - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Returns world width.
getWorld() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Controller
Returns the controlled world.
getX() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the current x coordinate.
getY() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns the current y coordinate.
grow() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Increases critter size by one.
GROW - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: grow (increase size).
GROW - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Spend energy to increase size.
GROW_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 

H

hasArgument() - Method in class compiler.ast.command.ActionNode
Checks whether this action has an argument.
hasArgument() - Method in class compiler.ast.expression.SensorNode
Checks whether this sensor query has an argument.
hasArgument() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Action
Indicates whether this action carries an argument.
hasCritter() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Indicates whether this hex contains a critter.
hasFood() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Indicates whether this hex contains food.
hashCode() - Method in record class compiler.simulation.HexCoordinate
Returns a hash code value for this object.
HEIGHT - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
HexCoordinate - Record Class in compiler.simulation
Immutable doubled-coordinate position in the hex grid.
HexCoordinate(int, int) - Constructor for record class compiler.simulation.HexCoordinate
Creates an instance of a HexCoordinate record class.
HexDirection - Enum Class in compiler.simulation
The six doubled-coordinate directions used by the hex grid.
HexMath - Class in compiler.simulation
Hex-grid utility methods.
HexState - Class in compiler.simulation
Immutable state of a single world hex.

I

index() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Returns the canonical direction index.
INITIAL_ENERGY - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
interpret(Critter, World) - Method in interface compiler.simulation.InterpreterVisitor
Chooses the next action for a critter in the current world state.
interpret(Critter, World) - Method in class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
 
InterpreterVisitor - Interface in compiler.simulation
Produces the next runtime action for a critter.
isAlive() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Indicates whether the critter is alive.
isAssignable() - Method in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Indicates whether this slot is writable via assignment sugar.
isAssignableSugar(int) - Static method in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Checks whether a memory index is writable according to sugar rules.
isDead() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Indicates whether the critter is dead.
isEmpty() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Indicates whether this hex is empty (no rock, no food, no critter).
isInBounds(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Checks whether a coordinate lies inside rectangular world bounds.
isRock() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Indicates whether this hex is a rock.
isValidCoordinate(int, int) - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexMath
Checks whether a doubled-coordinate pair is structurally valid.
isValidCoordinate(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Checks whether a coordinate is in bounds and valid for doubled-hex parity.
isWithinBounds(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexMath
Checks whether a coordinate lies inside world bounds.

K

killCritter(Critter, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Removes a critter and replaces its cell with food.

L

LBRACE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: { (left brace for command blocks).
LBRACKET - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: [ (left bracket for arrays/lists).
LEFT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: left (turn left).
LEFT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Rotate left by one step.
Lexer - Class in compiler.lexer
Performs lexical analysis on source code, converting raw text into a sequence of tokens.
Lexer(String) - Constructor for class compiler.lexer.Lexer
Initializes the lexer with source code to tokenize.
line - Variable in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Source line number (1-based) where this node begins in the source code.
loadFromFile(Path) - Static method in class compiler.io.CritterLoader
Loads a critter from a file at the given path.
loadFromFile(Path) - Static method in class compiler.io.WorldLoader
Loads a world from a file at the given path.
LogicNode - Class in compiler.ast.condition
Represents a logical combination of conditions (AND/OR chains).
LogicNode(Condition, String, Condition, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.condition.LogicNode
Creates a logical condition node.
LPAREN - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: ( (left parenthesis for grouping/function calls).

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class compiler.io.Console
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Loads world and critters, then runs a real-time simulation.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Entry point for the Toadally Awesome World Simulator.

MANNA_COUNT - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants

MEMSIZE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar

MIN_MEMORY - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
MOVE_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
moveCritter(Critter, HexDirection) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Attempts to move a critter one step in the given direction.
moveTo(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Moves critter to a new location.
MULOP - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Category: multiplicative operators (* or /).
mutate(Program) - Method in class compiler.ast.MutatorVisitor
Applies one or more random mutations to the input program.
mutate(Program, Random) - Static method in class compiler.ast.MutatorVisitor
Applies zero or more random mutations to the input program.
mutateAttribute(Random) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Applies a random attribute mutation to this critter.
MUTATION_PROBABILITY - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
MutatorVisitor - Class in compiler.ast
Applies random structural mutations to AST programs.
MutatorVisitor(Random) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.MutatorVisitor
Creates a new mutator with the given random source.

N

name - Variable in class compiler.io.WorldLoader.WorldAndController
 
NEARBY - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: nearby (query nearby cells).
neighbor(int, int, HexDirection) - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexMath
Returns adjacent coordinate in the provided direction.
neighbor(int, int, HexDirection) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Returns neighboring coordinate in the given direction.
NORTH - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 0 with delta (0, +2).
NORTHEAST - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 1 with delta (+1, +1).
NORTHWEST - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 5 with delta (-1, +1).
NUMBER - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Literal: numeric value (integer).
NumberNode - Class in compiler.ast.expression
Represents a numeric literal in the AST.
NumberNode(int, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.expression.NumberNode
Creates a numeric literal node.

Creates an interpreter copy suitable for an offspring critter.

opposite() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Returns the opposite direction.
OR - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType

P

parseContent(String) - Static method in class compiler.io.CritterLoader
Parses critter specification from text content.
parseContent(String, Path) - Static method in class compiler.io.WorldLoader
Parses world specification from text content.
parseProgram() - Method in class compiler.parser.Parser
Parses a complete program from the token stream.
Parser - Class in compiler.parser
Performs syntax analysis using recursive descent parsing.
Parser(String) - Constructor for class compiler.parser.Parser
Initializes the parser and performs lexical analysis in one step.
PASS - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Pass counter slot.
placeCritter(Critter, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Places a critter on an empty valid hex.
placeFood(int, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Places food on an empty valid hex.
placeRock(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Places a rock on an empty valid hex.
POSTURE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Posture slot (assignable).
PrettyPrinter - Class in compiler.ast
Formats an AST back into source-like text.
PrettyPrinter() - Constructor for class compiler.ast.PrettyPrinter
Creates a pretty-printer visitor.
Program - Class in compiler.ast
Represents a complete program at the top level of the AST.
Program(List<Rule>, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.Program
Keeps rule order intact because evaluation semantics depend on source ordering.
ProgramCritterInterpreter - Class in compiler.simulation
Interprets a parsed AST program for one critter.
ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
Creates an interpreter with a default random source.
ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program, Random) - Constructor for class compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
Creates an interpreter with an explicit random source.

R

RANDOM - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: random (generate random value).
RBRACE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: } (right brace for command blocks).
RBRACKET - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: ] (right bracket for arrays/lists).
readMemory(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Returns a value from the critter's memory array.
REL - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Category: relational operators (<, >, <=, >=, =, !=).
RelationNode - Class in compiler.ast.condition
Represents an atomic relational condition in the AST.
RelationNode(Expression, String, Expression, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.condition.RelationNode
Creates a relational condition node.
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: right (turn right).
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Rotate right by one step.
rock() - Static method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns the canonical rock state.
ROCK_VALUE - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
rotateLeft() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Rotates this direction left by one step.
rotateRight() - Method in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Rotates this direction right by one step.
RPAREN - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: ) (right parenthesis for grouping/function calls).
Rule - Class in compiler.ast
Represents a single rule in the program.
Rule - Interface in compiler.ast.marker
Marker interface for AST rule nodes.
Rule(Condition, Command, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.Rule
Creates a new rule pairing a condition and command.
RULE_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
run() - Method in class compiler.io.Console
Run the interactive console.

S

selectRandomNode(ASTNode, Random) - Static method in class compiler.ast.MutatorVisitor
Selects a random AST node by subtree-size-weighted index.
SEMICOLON - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Punctuation: ; (statement terminator).
SensorNode - Class in compiler.ast.expression
Represents a sensor query expression in the AST.
SensorNode(TokenType, Expression, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.ast.expression.SensorNode
Creates a sensor query node.
SERVE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: serve (serve food to allies).
SERVE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Serve energy/food amount as specified by argument.
setDefense(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Sets defense with minimum 1 enforcement.
setDirection(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Sets the direction using modular normalization into range 0..5.
setMemorySize(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Sets memory size with minimum 7 enforcement.
setOffense(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Sets offense with minimum 1 enforcement.
setPosture(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Sets posture with bounds enforcement (0-99).
SIZE - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.Sugar
Size stat slot.
SMELL - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: smell (detect via smell).
SOLAR_FLUX - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
SOUTH - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 3 with delta (0, -2).
SOUTHEAST - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 2 with delta (+1, -1).
SOUTHWEST - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.HexDirection
Direction index 4 with delta (-1, -1).
step() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Controller
Advances the simulation by one controller step.
step(HexDirection) - Method in record class compiler.simulation.HexCoordinate
Returns a new coordinate one step in the provided direction.
subtreeSize - Variable in class compiler.ast.ASTNode
Total number of nodes in this subtree (including this node).
Sugar - Enum Class in compiler.lexer
Named aliases for fixed critter memory slots.
syncMemoryArray() - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Syncs the memory array with derived critter state.
SyntaxException - Exception Class in compiler.error
Thrown when the input violates lexical or syntactic grammar rules.
SyntaxException(String, int, int) - Constructor for exception class compiler.error.SyntaxException
Creates a syntax error with the given message and source location.

T

takeFood(int, int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.World
Removes and returns up to amount food from a hex.
toChildList(ASTNode) - Static method in class compiler.ast.ASTNodeUtils
Safely constructs a child list from an optional node.
Token - Class in compiler.lexer
Represents a single lexical token extracted from source code.
Token(TokenType, String, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.lexer.Token
Convenience overload for non-numeric tokens (keywords, operators, identifiers).
Token(TokenType, String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class compiler.lexer.Token
Full constructor carrying both textual and numeric forms.
tokenize() - Method in class compiler.lexer.Lexer
Tokenizes the entire source code and returns a list of tokens in source order.
TokenType - Enum Class in compiler.lexer
Enumeration of all token types in the language grammar.
toString() - Method in record class compiler.simulation.HexCoordinate
Returns a string representation of this record class.
TURN_ENERGY_COST - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Controller
Energy spent each turn for base movement/rotation actions.

U

updateInterpreter(InterpreterVisitor) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Updates the interpreter for this critter (used by mutation system).
UpdateNode - Class in compiler.ast.command
Represents a memory update command in the AST.

Creates a memory update node.

W

WAIT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.lexer.TokenType
Keyword: wait (pause execution).
WAIT - Enum constant in enum class compiler.simulation.ActionType
Do nothing for this turn.
WIDTH - Static variable in class compiler.simulation.Constants
 
withCritter(Critter) - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns a state with the given critter occupant.
withFood(int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns a state with updated food amount.
withoutCritter() - Method in class compiler.simulation.HexState
Returns a state without any critter occupant.
world - Variable in class compiler.io.WorldLoader.WorldAndController
 
World - Class in compiler.simulation
Thread-safe hex world snapshot.

Creates a world with the given rectangular bounds.
WorldLoader - Class in compiler.io
Loads world definitions from text files.

WorldLoader.WorldAndController - Class in compiler.io
Result of loading a world: name, world, and controller.
writeMemory(int, int) - Method in class compiler.simulation.Critter
Writes a value to the critter's memory array.
